name: Smoky Baba Ghanoush
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash eggplants and use a fork to prick them in about 5 spots.
2. Grill the whole eggplants over medium-hot coals.
3. Turn the eggplants every 5 minutes to evenly char the skin.
4. Grill until the eggplants are just soft and charred all over, about 20 minutes.
5. Cool the grilled eggplants.
6. Cut each eggplant in half and scoop out the insides. You may need to peel the skin if the eggplant becomes too mushy.
7. In a food processor fitted with a metal blade, combine the eggplant, garlic, salt, sugar, tahini, lemon juice, and pepper.
8. Puree until smooth. If the mixture is too thick, add a little water to achieve the desired consistency.
9. Adjust seasoning as needed.
This paste, made from sesame seeds, can be found at most grocery stores. The recipe makes 2 cups depending on the size of the eggplants.
